use_cases: Interactive background element for landing pages and portfolios
Decorative cursor-following animation for creative websites
Visual loading state with physics-based motion
Engaging hover interaction for design showcases
Ambient canvas animation for digital art installations
ai_summary: An interactive canvas component featuring spring physics simulation that creates a flowing rope-like line effect following the mouse cursor. The animation uses node-based chain dynamics with configurable tension, dampening, and friction to produce organic, fluid motion. Ideal for adding engaging interactive elements to creative portfolios, SaaS landing pages, or developer tool interfaces with a clean minimalist aesthetic.
